response.justification: Strong senior software developer with 15+ years of broad experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective founder), Linux/Unix proficiency, and a track record of mentoring through workshops and talks. However, the role requires C1 German and the candidate only has basic German, which is a hard requirement. Architecture and explicit leadership/team-lead experience are present but not deeply emphasized, and UML/formal modeling expertise is not mentioned.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and polyglot engineering background with open-source leadership (GISCollective founder)
Strong Linux/Unix and open-source orientation matching the company's digital sovereignty focus
Proven knowledge sharing via workshops, courses, and conference talks — a plus for mentoring
concerns: German language is only Basic, well below the required C1 level
No explicit formal team-lead/Head-of-Development title or org-leadership scope demonstrated
UML, requirements management, and formal architecture modeling not mentioned on the resume

key_factors.factor: Missing explicit leadership and UML/modeling credentials
